ria.intro: Hey there 👋 I’m Ria. What’s on your mind?
ria.greetings.long1: Hey {{name}} 👋 I’m here. What’s on your mind?
ria.greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 What would you like to talk about today?
ria.greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}! I’m all ears — what’s up?
ria.greetings.long4: Nice to see you, {{name}} 👋 What’s on your mind today?
ria.greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 🙂 Want to vent, ask, or just chat?
ria.greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}! I’ve got time — what would you like to talk about?
ria.greetings.short1: Hey {{name}}, I’m still here. What’s up?
ria.greetings.short2: Welcome back {{name}} 👋 Anything else you wanted to add?
ria.greetings.short3: Back again, {{name}}? 😊 Tell me what’s on your mind.
ria.greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} ✨ Ready to pick up where we left off?
ria.greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}! Got something new on your mind?

help.title: Help
helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.faq.account.q: How do I create or recover my account?
helpCenter.faq.account.a: Download the app or use web, tap “Create account”, verify your email/phone. To recover, use “Forgot password”.
helpCenter.faq.privacy.a: Yes. Messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted by default. Only you and the recipient can read them.
helpCenter.faq.translate.a: Enable “Auto-translate” in Settings → Appearance & Language. We translate on-device where supported, otherwise through secure APIs with minimal metadata.
helpCenter.faq.contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include screenshots and your app version.
gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.subtitle: New to Chatforia? This quick start shows the essentials so you can be productive in minutes.
gettingStarted.alert.text: This guide will grow as we launch new features. If something’s missing, let us know via
gettingStarted.section1.title: 1) Create your account
gettingStarted.section1.prefsStart: In the app, open Settings to set your preferences
gettingStarted.section2.title: 2) Start messaging
gettingStarted.section2.item1: Create a DM or Group and send your first message.
gettingStarted.section2.item2: Use instant translation to chat across 100+ languages.
gettingStarted.section2.item3: Try disappearing messages and read receipts in Profile → Privacy.
gettingStarted.section3.title: 3) Go further
gettingStarted.section3.item1: You can upgrade to a paid plan anytime inside the app.
gettingStarted.section3.item2: Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.
gettingStarted.section3.item2Part1: Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.
howItWorks.title: How Chatforia Works
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia is designed to make communication simple, fast, and accessible. Getting started takes just a few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up using your email or username to create your Chatforia account.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect with others by selecting contacts or starting new chats.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Messages are delivered quickly to provide a smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-in translation helps users communicate across different languages.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Manage your preferences, contacts, and communication settings.
safety.title: Safety & Community Guidelines
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all users. These guidelines help ensure a positive experience for everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected to communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, or harmful behavior is not permitted.
safety.tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction
safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.
blog.whyMessaging.title: Why Messaging Platforms Matter More Than Ever
blog.whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms have become one of the most important tools for communication in today’s world. From personal conversations to business interactions, messaging apps allow people to stay connected instantly and efficiently.
blog.whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely on messaging apps for daily communication with friends, family, and colleagues. Whether it's a quick update or a long conversation, messaging provides a convenient and flexible way to stay in touch.
blog.whyMessaging.speedDesc: One of the main advantages of messaging platforms is their speed. Messages are delivered instantly, allowing users to communicate in real time. This level of convenience has made messaging the preferred method of communication for many people.
blog.whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across the globe. With internet access, users can communicate regardless of location, making it easier to build relationships and collaborate internationally.
blog.whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus on giving users control over their data and conversations. Features like encryption, privacy settings, and message controls allow users to communicate with confidence.
blog.whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues to evolve with new features such as AI-powered responses, translation, and multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms will become even more powerful and versatile.
blog.whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia is built with these principles in mind, offering a fast, secure, and user-friendly messaging experience for a connected world.
blog.global.title: The Future of Global Communication
blog.global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over the past few decades. What once required phone calls or in-person meetings can now be done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues to advance, global communication is becoming faster, more accessible, and more inclusive.
blog.global.barriersDesc: One of the biggest changes in communication is the reduction of geographic barriers. People can now connect with others across the world in near real time. Whether for personal conversations, business, or collaboration, messaging platforms have made distance far less limiting.
blog.global.translationDesc: Language has traditionally been one of the biggest obstacles to global communication. Today, built-in translation tools help bridge that gap. Platforms like Chatforia allow users to communicate more easily even if they speak different languages, creating new opportunities for connection and understanding.
blog.global.realtimeDesc: Speed is a key factor shaping modern communication. Users expect messages to be delivered quickly, and modern infrastructure supports that expectation. Real-time messaging enables more natural and fluid conversations.
blog.global.privacyDesc: As communication becomes more digital, privacy and security are increasingly important. Users want confidence that their conversations are protected. Features like encryption and user-controlled settings help support a more secure communication experience.
blog.global.futureDesc: The future of global communication will likely include more advanced tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved translation, and enhanced user experiences. As technology evolves, communication will continue to become more intuitive and accessible.
blog.global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia are part of this shift, helping people connect more easily across languages and borders.
blog.index.title: Chatforia Blog
blog.index.intro: Explore insights on communication, online safety, and how messaging technology is connecting people around the world.
blog.chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
blog.chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.
blog.chatSafely.personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
blog.chatSafely.personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.
blog.chatSafely.safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
blog.chatSafely.safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.
blog.chatSafely.scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
blog.chatSafely.scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.
blog.chatSafely.responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
blog.chatSafely.responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.
blog.chatSafely.whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
blog.chatSafely.whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.
blog.chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.
about.privacyDesc: End-to-end encryption and privacy controls are built into Chatforia from the start.
about.accessDesc: Chatforia helps people connect across languages, devices, and borders.
about.controlDesc: Choose how messages appear, when they disappear, and how your account stays protected.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.successMsg: Thanks—our team will reply by email.
contact.errorSend: Could not send. Please email support@chatforia.com.
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.
privacyPolicy.infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
privacyPolicy.infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
privacyPolicy.infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
privacyPolicy.infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.
privacyPolicy.sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
privacyPolicy.sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.
privacyPolicy.sms.addRecipient: Add a recipient above to start…
privacyPolicy.howWeUse.title: How we use information
privacyPolicy.howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).
privacyPolicy.sharing.title: Sharing
privacyPolicy.sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.
privacyPolicy.rights.title: Your rights
privacyPolicy.rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.
privacyPolicy.retention.title: Data retention & security
privacyPolicy.retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.
privacyPolicy.children.title: Children
privacyPolicy.children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law).
privacyPolicy.changes.title: Changes
privacyPolicy.changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.
privacyPolicy.contact.title: Contact
privacyPolicy.contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro.body: By using Chatforia you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, don’t use the service.
terms.accounts.title: Accounts
terms.accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info and keep credentials secure.
terms.accounts.itemResponsibility: You’re responsible for activity on your account.
terms.acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
terms.acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse.
terms.sms.title: SMS communications
terms.sms.body: If you provide a mobile phone number, you agree that Chatforia may send you SMS messages related to your account and use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, and messages related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings in the app.
terms.yourContent.title: Your content
terms.yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).
terms.disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
terms.disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages.
terms.changes.title: Changes
terms.changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.
terms.contact.title: Contact
terms.contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
refund.contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below.
cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings.
smsPolicy.title: Chatforia — SMS Policy & Opt-in
smsPolicy.whatWeSend.title: What we send
smsPolicy.whatWeSend.body: Chatforia sends only account-related and conversational SMS to phone numbers a user has explicitly provided and consented to. Typical messages include login/verification codes, message delivery alerts, security notices, and transactional account updates.
smsPolicy.optIn.title: How users opt in
smsPolicy.optIn.body: Users opt in by entering their phone number during registration and checking the SMS consent checkbox on the registration page or the dedicated
smsPolicy.optOut.title: How users opt out
smsPolicy.optOut.stop: Reply STOP to any Chatforia SMS to opt out.
smsPolicy.help.title: Help
smsPolicy.help.bodyPrefix: Reply HELP for assistance or email
smsPolicy.privacyTerms.title: Privacy & Terms
